title: Bridge Essay: Report from a Tibetan Monastery: EEG neural correlates of concentrative and anal

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.

**Report from a Tibetan Monastery: EEG neural correlates of concentrative and analytical meditation.** — Frontiers in psychology (2024). PMID: . DOI: 10.17761/2021-D-20-00014. Score: 16. The positive effects of meditation on human wellbeing are indisputable, ranging from emotion regulation improvement to stress reduction and present-moment awareness enhancement. Changes in brain activity regulate and support these phenomena. However, the heterogeneity of meditation practices and their cultural background, as well as their poor categorization limit the generalization of results to all types of meditation.
